history.content:
<thought>
I am at the top-left interior cell facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The path downward along the left column is open and leads around the lava barrier toward the goal, so I should first face downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I start near the upper-left, facing down. The cell directly ahead is open, and the safe path goes straight down the left corridor toward the bottom row, where I can then head right to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column 2 facing down. The cell directly ahead is open, and the left column forms a safe path downward toward the bottom row, from which I can head right to the goal. So the best next step is to continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down near the left side. The cell directly in front of me is open, and the path downward along the left column is clear toward the bottom corridor that leads to the goal on the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at the left side. Moving forward would hit the bottom wall soon, while the open path to the goal is below and then across to the right along the bottom corridor. First I should move down into the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down near the lower-left area. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. To make progress toward the open corridor and the goal on the bottom-right, I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but there is lava immediately in front of me, so moving forward is unsafe. The safe path is downward along the left corridor toward the bottom row, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at the left side. Moving forward would hit the wall below, so I should turn to face right and move along the open corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but there is lava directly ahead, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path goes downward along my current column toward the bottom corridor, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down near the lower-left area. Moving forward would hit the wall below, so I should first turn to face right and then travel along the bottom corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path goes downward along my current column, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down near the lower-left area, and there is a wall directly below me, so moving forward is blocked. The open path continues to my right along the bottom corridor toward the goal, so I should rotate to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path is below me, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at the left side. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The open path goes to my right along the bottom area, so I should first turn to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but there is lava immediately in front of me. I should turn to avoid stepping into lava and head toward the open corridor below.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down near the lower-left area. Moving forward would hit the wall below, so I should first turn to face right and then travel along the open corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side facing right. Directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path is upward along my current column, so I should turn left to face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-left side facing up. The cell directly ahead is open, and moving upward is the safe first step to progress around the lava columns toward the open bottom corridor leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side facing up. The cell ahead is open, and moving upward along this left corridor is the safe path to eventually go around the lava barrier toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up at the left side. Moving forward would hit a wall, and to my right there is a vertical lava barrier. The only safe open direction is downward, so I should turn around; first step is to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but there is lava directly in front of me. The safe path is to go down along the left side toward the open bottom corridor, so I should first turn to face downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at the left side. The cell in front of me is open, and the safe path goes downward along the left corridor before heading right on the bottom row toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down near the left side. Moving forward would lead along the safe corridor, while turning is unnecessary right now. Advancing downward helps me reach the bottom row, where there is a clear path to the goal on the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down near the lower-left side. Moving forward would hit the wall below. The open safe path is to the right along the left corridor and then across the bottom, so I should first turn to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path goes downward from my current position, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
